title: Rob's Floating Islands
description: A vanilla+ mod that adds small floating islands with treasure
body:
# Rob's Floating Islands 1.16.x, 1.18.x, 1.19.x, 1.20.x, 1.21.1

_Forge: 1.20 and below, NeoForge: 1.21.1._

### Rob's Floating Islands adds lots of new floating islands with great treasure to explore!

 It currently adds over a Dozen Islands and each has its own randomly generated loot!
 

![screenshot of an island](https://i.imgur.com/kVL3e1e.png)

![screenshot of an island 2](https://i.imgur.com/cwKsMtk.png)

![screenshot of an island 3](https://i.imgur.com/oExK6Dq.png)

Examples of treasure locations:

![screenshot of treasure on island](https://i.imgur.com/iP6UMTZ.png)

![screenshot of treasure on island](https://i.imgur.com/GUkYs2l.png)
